item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Wildfire Mitigation Grant
item.description:
👀 Federal Wildfire Mitigation

What

Federal wildfire mitigation grant program expansion in the 119th Congress.

What it does

  • Community wildfire protection plan funding · home-hardening grants · fuels-management treatment funding · Tribal wildfire-mitigation provisions · cooperative-class community-defense provisions.

Composes

Climate Disaster Resilience + Save-the-World Paper 5 (Earth Stewardship).

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
